# Merge Request Review

## Applies when
- Reviewing GitLab merge requests or generating review summaries/notes.

## Instructions
- Stay read-only unless asked to propose edits; provide actionable findings ordered by severity with file/line references.
- Check for alignment with branch protections, approvals required, and pipeline status; flag any missing tests or docs.
- Suggest follow-up tasks (labels, reviewers, draft status) and link issues/MRs when relevant.
- Keep comments concise and specific: what is wrong, why it matters, and how to fix or improve.
